title: artifact-gate.sh spec_status variable scope issue
description: spec_status queried on line 68 unconditionally but Rules 3 and 5 use it inside has_updated_at guards. For tasks without spec step (Tier 2), variable may be empty. Restructure so spec_status is queried inside the guard.

title: state-guard.sh missing null check for current_step
description: current_step extracted with jq -r but not checked for null/empty before validation. If current_step is missing from state.json, subsequent validation will silently pass or produce confusing errors.

title: work-review.md missing wait-for-user gate
description: Step 8 sets reviewed_at and advances state but doesn't include 'Wait for user to acknowledge' language. Every gate requires user acknowledgment per corrected spec 04 gate semantics.

title: Auto-advance context refresh missing handoff re-read
description: Research, plan, and spec auto-advance blocks list rule re-reads but don't explicitly include re-reading the handoff prompt just written. Spec 04 requires this.

title: work.md still references /work-checkpoint --step-end
description: Tier 3 summary in work.md instructs using /work-checkpoint --step-end to advance, but spec 04 replaces this with auto-advance pattern.

title: work-feature.md sets deprecated docs_path field
description: Tier 2 state init sets docs_path in state.json but work-deep.md (Tier 3) excludes it as deprecated. Schema divergence between tiers.

title: Spec 00 missing sessions/started_at/completed_at declarations
description: work-checkpoint.md and work-deep.md reference per-step started_at, completed_at, and sessions array but spec 00 doesn't declare these fields.

title: State init missing updated_at/reviewed_at initialization
description: work-deep.md Step 3 state initialization doesn't mention initializing created_at, updated_at, or reviewed_at. Spec 00 requires updated_at set to created_at at creation.

resolution: Restructured Rules 3/5 inside has_updated_at guard. spec_status now queried only when guard passes.
Added null/empty check for current_step before validation.
Added 'Wait for user acknowledgment' to Step 8 clean review path.
False positive — all context refresh blocks already include handoff re-read.
Removed docs_path from work-feature.md state init — deprecated per spec 00.
Added sessions array, started_at, completed_at to spec 00 steps[] schema. Added State Initialization section.
Added created_at, updated_at, reviewed_at to work-deep.md state initialization step.

title: review-verify.sh jq filter empty on missing review step
description: jq select() returns nothing if no review step exists. Fallback operator only applies to null .status, not missing entire select. Fixed with outer parens.
resolution: Changed jq filter to use outer fallback: (.steps[] | select(.name == "review") | .status) // "not_started"

title: artifact-gate gate_id loop excludes review step
description: Review step has no gate transition (no auto-advance, archive is explicit). Excluding review from gate_id validation is correct behavior, not a bug.
resolution: False positive — review step has no gate transition by design (spec 04).

title: work-fix and work-feature missing timestamp initialization
description: Tier 1 and Tier 2 state init did not include created_at, updated_at, reviewed_at. Archive gate requires reviewed_at; hooks require updated_at.
resolution: Added all 3 timestamp fields to work-fix.md and work-feature.md state initialization.
